title: Oil gains amid signs of stronger demand
section_path: Oil gains amid signs of stronger demand
section_path_text: Oil gains amid signs of stronger demand
summary:
Main
The changing geopolitical landscape continues to keep volatility high in commodity markets. Oil prices gained amid signs of stronger demand. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-03-27 124731.png | assets/2025-03-27_oil-gains-amid-signs-of-stronger-demand_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_0a4b2ddb09a1.png

Market Commentary
Crude oil prices gained amid signs of strong demand.

children.title: Main
children.summary: The changing geopolitical landscape continues to keep volatility high in commodity markets. Oil prices gained amid signs of stronger demand.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices gained amid signs of strong demand. US crude oil inventories fell by 3.34mbbls last week and now sit at the lowest levels in about a month.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: US crude oil inventories remain near seasonal lows amid strong demand and ongoing supply tightness. This should provide some support to prices in the near term.
